required_negative_declarations: No raw broker payloads are included.
No private account data is included.
No live micro action is authorized.
allowed_future_probe_purpose: Owner approval review of a future value-free broker probe scope only; no broker contact, credentials, account identifiers, private broker data, order placement, scheduler, daemon, webhook, demo action, live micro action, or live trading is authorized by this review.
required_owner_approvals_before_probe: Human Owner approval of the exact value-free broker probe scope
Human Owner approval of runtime-only credential handling if any future probe needs credentials
Human Owner approval of sanitized output fields before any future probe output is generated
Human Owner approval of stop point, rollback, and kill-switch conditions before any future probe attempt
required_runtime_credential_rules_for_fu: do not read .env unless a later packet explicitly approves credential use and .env access
do not print, log, persist, or commit credentials
do not include credentials in prompts, reports, telemetry, screenshots, or fixtures
stop immediately if credential exposure is suspected
required_no_persistence_rules_for_future: do not persist raw broker payloads
do not persist private account data
do not persist credentials or .env contents
required_sanitized_output_rules_for_futu: output only value-free, sanitized status classifications
required_stop_point_for_future_probe: Stop after owner approval review of the value-free broker probe scope; no broker contact, credential use, .env read, account identifier use, demo action, live micro action, live trading, scheduler, daemon, webhook, or order execution.
required_rollback_kill_switch_conditions: stop if broker API contact is requested before explicit owner approval
stop if credential use is requested before explicit owner approval
stop if .env access is requested before explicit owner approval
stop if account identifiers or private broker data appear in output
stop if demo action, live micro action, live trading, or order execution is requested
stop if scheduler, daemon, loop, or webhook activation is requested
stop if current repo authority conflicts with the probe scope
next_safe_action: Request Human Owner approval review of the value-free broker probe scope using the generated DRY_RUN-only next packet; keep broker probe readiness, demo proof, live micro, live trading, scheduler, daemon, webhook, credentials, broker API, .env access, account persistence, and order execution locked.
packet_name: Consume Value-Free Broker Proof Owner Statement V1
